title: Schacht Law Office
description:
Schacht Law Office specializes in intellectual property legal services, focusing on the protect
ion of patents, trademarks, copyrights, and trade secrets. They assist clients in defining and 
safeguarding their ideas to ensure the prosperity of their intellectual property and brand.

We will upload 20gb of corporate data soon. Lots of clients data (credit cards, name, addresses
, phones and so on), contracts and agreements, NDAs, projects, etc.
